title: bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. exiguum
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. exiguum, also known as Chinese Kudzu Bupleurum, is a variant of the Bupleurum ranunculoides plant species, belonging to the Apiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. exiguum include reducing fever, relieving colds and flu symptoms, and improving liver function. It can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
